notes.kernel_clone_dirty: Each kernel's results.jsonl.manifest.json reports dirty:true. The Kaggle clone runs npm ci, which mutates partially-committed tools/calc node_modules; battle content is unaffected (server_patch_hash + showdown_commit are pinned).
notes.trickroom_zero_sample_game: trickroom ran 75 games but only 74 produced training rows; one game was a legitimate blowout that sampled zero decisions. The coverage gate threshold is ceil(0.9*games) = 68, so 74/75 passes.

regeneration.battle_identity_check: winner/turns sequences identical to v1 quarters (0 diffs x 4 x 75). The seeded battles and their labels are byte-identical to v1; only the previously-sentinel feature columns were completed by the extractor wiring fix.
regeneration.features_completed: 16 sentinel columns (slot{1,2}_move_type/move_category/priority/is_damaging/is_protect, slot{1,2}_actor_species_id/switch_target_species_id/target_species_id_if_known) plus mirror_flag are now live (non-constant) in the merged dataset.
regeneration.uniform_repo_sha_note: All four quarters now share repo sha 583e0a0 (previously fixed/trickroom/sun/rain were exported on four different shas). config_hash and server_patch_hash are now uniform across all quarters as well.
regeneration.why: All four quarters were re-exported on repo sha 583e0a0 (fix(2b-2.5a): wire dex/move_meta/mirror_flag into dataset export). The v1 dataset (commit 6b46d42) had an extractor wiring bug: DatasetExportRuntime was built with dex=None/move_meta=None and mirror_flag hardcoded False, so 16 move/species-derived columns were 100% sentinel and mirror_flag was constant. The fix wires engine.moves._move_table() (move_meta) and battle.opponent.SpeciesDex (dex) plus real mirror detection into both gauntlet.py export call sites.
